Features & improvements

Upgrades that automated valuations do not capture.

Improvement story

Renovated, maintained, and prepared for the next owner.

The property's value is not just in square footage. It is in the quality of updates, the shop, the land, and the long-term maintenance already performed.

Beautifully remodeled custom ranch

Finished lower level with office and adjoining private bath

Completely remodeled kitchen with solid-surface counters

New appliances plus main-floor washer and dryer

Fresh interior and exterior paint

New HVAC system

One-acre irrigated lot with private well

Landscape lighting and upgraded landscaping

Outdoor fire pit and entertaining area

Detached climate-controlled shop with bathroom

Space for 6+ vehicles plus separate mower/storage bay

One-year deluxe home warranty included
